item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Assholes can park after all…
item.description:
So; a while ago I found this council sticker in it’s bag, blown on the wind. Car authorised for removal sticker. I’ll be honest… I kept it because I thought I would prank a friend…
Several days later I find this asshole parking across two spots, and not for the first time (distinct car). It seemed the perfect opportunity? For the record, I was late for a meeting. Trying to find parking the previous time so I already had a petty vendetta.
I’m not sure this counts as ‘impersonating a police officer’ but I did fill out his car details with a fake ‘authorised for removal’ sticker for ‘Parking’. Did I do wrong? Obviously - *obviously* there is no chance how car would be touched, from the top floor of a car park; nobody else knew about it..?!
But I did feel quite happy leaving them this gift.
And who should I find in the same space today? But look how well they have parked now ?
Look at that consideration? Space for another car next to them? Isn’t that kind. So. I plead my guilt to the Imgur jury, and ask… was I right or was I wrong? Judge me!
item.dc:creator: GiddyKipper

item.title: Images of Note: That is a butthole
item.description:
I need to message people this when I do not want to go out.
Who did that? WHO DID THAT TO THEM! I WILL REMOVE YOUR FUCKING SPINAL FLUID!
S H A R K !
Christopher Robin killed God then married his cousin.
Huskies are smort
chaos!
"You should have kids you do not want to have!" "But I do not want to have kids!" "That's Selfish!" "Surely having kids I do not want to have would be unfair on the kids because I never wanted to have them in the first place? Surely by demanding I have kids I do not want to have, you are being selfish?" "Don't care, I just want to enforce social norms by forcing people to have kids they never wanted to have in the first place out of blind social obligation."
I said this about the whole JoCat fiasco: It is not enough for transphobes and homophobes for you to be cis, you must be cis and straight in a way they approve of.
This is a butthole.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. I can see how that can be intimidating....
2
3. NOT TODAY
4
5. Guy want's to break free
6
7
8. Bro lifted so much, he moved his spirit
9. What were you expecting to happen?!
10
11
12
13. There's a neat way to test that hypothesis ;)
14. I'm sorry but you have been scrolling for too long and I now have to charge you a puppy tax
15. And finally I would like to share something awesome from myself. I've been working very hard (in the past year or so months) on "Stanley Parable"-like game with a touch of GladOS from "Portal". If you happen to be a gaming fan, please wishlist. The demo was part of Steam Next Fest and got some really postivereaction : ) A guy on Discord said it is good, and my mom said you should try it, best thing she played since Super Mario (and only thing) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Just screaming into the morning
item.description: I'm going to work right now to resign from my toxic ass job, and I'm scared. I *think* I have a job on the bag but I'm not certain. All I know is that the day after I got into a car accident last week, my boss sent a text that said "you're out of pto time and there's some questions only you can answer about some bracing" That was the final straw. So this morning, I'm going to work, sitting in the admin lobby, compiling an email to the CEO, meeting with HR, resigning, collecting my things, and leaving for good. When you WAKE UP with a wet face and tears streaming down it, it's time to free yourself from that toxicity, right? Wish me luck, imgur. I'm about to be jobless (again). EDIT: MV for this purple sweet potato?! Lol don't judge my messy stovetop, please! Thanks, imgur! I feel SOOOO much better and lighter! ? Any imgurians near Orlando (or east!) who wanna link up, DM me! I *always* need a Universal buddy! I'm gonna celebrate today by getting higher than giraffe titties and watching some stand up comedians. Any suggestions?!
item.dc:creator: MadamPuddifoot

Subscribe wherever is most convenient for you: Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/becomesupporter/LitterboxComics Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/litterboxcomics * Bonus panels will go live for everyone next year when I repost

item.dc:creator: infallibledegenerate

item.title: Excuse my ugly crying but I GOT THE JOB!!!
item.description: I’ve been out of work for a year because I got really, really sick. I was bedridden for months. We had to move in with my parents. I lost all of my sense of worth while we struggled to pay our bills. It was the darkest year of my life. I have been working in the human services field for 9 years, and this job offer is with the state as a case manager. I’ll have comprehensive medical insurance, a pension, an office…I’m just in disbelief and so happy!
item.dc:creator: LaFlamme4182

item.title: Please don’t climb on top of each other for an autograph
item.description: Back when I lived in Atlanta as a broke ass student, I saw an ad to be in one of Delta’s instructional videos for their flights. It took 3-4hrs to film and I got $100, a bagel, and coffee out of it. They don’t play it anymore (this was years ago), but damn… it feels good to know I protected some lives.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

Custard Pączki
